scope.mode: Codex-only do-not-merge review artifact after identity193

validator_evidence: Global project records project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 and project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025 share identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project.
source_canonical_evidence: project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024: display_name '2017 Street Improvement Project (Woodhaven Blvd)', primary_source_id capital_woodhaven_blvd_capital_projects_cb5_sept2024, borough Queens, description says 6.85 miles of bus lanes on Woodhaven Blvd for the Q52/Q53 SBS launch.

project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025: display_name '79th Street 2017 Street Improvement Project', primary_source_id 79_st_riverside_dr_fdr_dr_cb7_apr2025, borough Manhattan, description says the project launched M79 SBS replacing M79 Local with queue jumps, bus lanes, signal timing, off-board fare payment, real-time passenger info, and amenities.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Strong location and route-scope conflict: Woodhaven Boulevard/Q52-Q53 work in Queens is not the 79th Street/M79 SBS street improvement in Manhattan. The shared 2017 Street Improvement Project label is too generic to carry project identity.
expected_duplicate_issues_suppressed: duplicate_global_identity for project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 vs project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025 on identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project

validator_evidence: Global project records project_able-camera-expansion-2022 and project_able-program share identity key project_automated-bus-lane-enforcement-able.
Global project records project_able-camera-expansion-2022 and project_able-program share identity key project_automated-bus-lane-enforcement-able-expansion.
source_canonical_evidence: project_able-camera-expansion-2022: display_name 'Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) Expansion 2023', primary_source_id meeting_doc_105921, project_type enforcement expansion, planned expansion from 423 to 1,023 camera-equipped buses and additional routes.

project_able-program: display_name 'MTA ABLE (Automated Bus Lane Enforcement) Program', primary_source_id bus_lane_camera_report_2024, project_type enforcement_program, operational on-bus camera enforcement system and broader program.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Program/subproject distinction: an ABLE camera expansion deployment is related to, but not identical with, the broader ABLE enforcement program.
expected_duplicate_issues_suppressed: duplicate_global_identity for project_able-camera-expansion-2022 vs project_able-program on identity key project_automated-bus-lane-enforcement-able
duplicate_global_identity for project_able-camera-expansion-2022 vs project_able-program on identity key project_automated-bus-lane-enforcement-able-expansion

validator_evidence: Global project records project_annual-2021-cbdtp and project_cbd-tolling-transcore-mod share identity key project_central-business-district-tolling-program-transcore-contract-modification.
source_canonical_evidence: project_annual-2021-cbdtp: display_name 'Central Business District Tolling Program', primary_source_id annual_report_narrative_2021, tolling/congestion pricing program for Manhattan south of and inclusive of 60th Street.

project_cbd-tolling-transcore-mod: display_name 'Central Business District Tolling Program - TransCore Modification', primary_source_id meeting_doc_124731, a contract modification adding $48.5M and extending a TransCore CBDTP contract by 40 months.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Program/contract-action distinction: a vendor contract modification under CBDTP is not the same canonical project identity as the Central Business District Tolling Program itself.
expected_duplicate_issues_suppressed: duplicate_global_identity for project_annual-2021-cbdtp vs project_cbd-tolling-transcore-mod on identity key project_central-business-district-tolling-program-transcore-contract-modification

Global project records project_jamaica-capacity-improvement and project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-phase2 share identity key project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-project-phase-2.
source_canonical_evidence: project_jamaica-capacity-improvement: display_name 'Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project', primary_source_id meeting_doc_100336, planned switch installations near Jamaica supporting capacity improvements.

project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-phase2: display_name 'Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project Phase 2', primary_source_id meeting_doc_102786, Phase 2/property-interest and easement actions for the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Parent/phase distinction: Phase 2 property-interest actions are within the Jamaica Capacity Improvement effort but should not be collapsed into the broader parent project record.
expected_duplicate_issues_suppressed: duplicate_global_identity for project_jamaica-capacity-improvement vs project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-phase2 on identity key project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-project

validator_evidence: Global project records project_hall-interlocking-expansion and project_jamaica-capacity-improvements share identity key project_hall-interlocking-expansion.
source_canonical_evidence: project_hall-interlocking-expansion: display_name 'Hall Interlocking Expansion Project', primary_source_id meeting_doc_104746, description says it is part of JCI Phase 2 and creates new parallel train routes east of Jamaica Station.

project_jamaica-capacity-improvements: display_name 'Jamaica Capacity Improvements', primary_source_id meeting_doc_105776, multi-phase capacity improvement program around Jamaica Station and Jamaica complex.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Component/parent distinction: Hall Interlocking Expansion is a component or subproject within Jamaica Capacity Improvements, not the same project identity as the broader JCI program.
expected_duplicate_issues_suppressed: duplicate_global_identity for project_hall-interlocking-expansion vs project_jamaica-capacity-improvements on identity key project_hall-interlocking-expansion

validator_evidence: Global project records project_lirr-security-initiatives and project_security-initiatives-nyct share identity key project_security-initiatives.
source_canonical_evidence: project_lirr-security-initiatives: display_name 'LIRR Security Initiatives', primary_source_id meeting_doc_102711, LIRR camera/electronic data retrieval and fire safety/unarmed guard funding.

project_security-initiatives-nyct: display_name 'Security Initiatives', primary_source_id meeting_doc_102816, NYCT Security Command Center staffing, laser intrusion alarm response, and Deployable Camera Unit work.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Agency/scope distinction: the shared 'Security Initiatives' label is generic. LIRR security-camera/electronic-data work and NYCT security command/deployable-camera work are distinct agency-specific initiatives.
expected_duplicate_issues_suppressed: duplicate_global_identity for project_lirr-security-initiatives vs project_security-initiatives-nyct on identity key project_security-initiatives

deferred.reason: Likely a durable do-not-merge because Woodhaven/Q52-Q53 and M79/79th Street are different scopes, but project_2017-street-improvement-79th has mixed Manhattan/Queens payload pollution and should be handled with a split/repair audit before adding this second suppression.
Likely parent/support-bundle distinction, but East Side Access support records are entangled with other support-project aliases and need a cluster-level review.
Likely broader Fordham Road-Inwood study versus narrower 2026 segment distinction, but both records are already targets for related Fordham aliases and need a cluster-level scope pass.
Likely adjacent/narrower segment distinction, but one record has merged field values that include the 60th-52nd segment; defer for split/repair versus suppression choice.
Likely support bundle versus specific construction project distinction, but it overlaps the East Side Access Support cluster and should be reviewed with that cluster.
Likely phase/broader state-of-good-repair distinction, but Park Avenue Viaduct phase and repair records are heavily cross-merged; defer for phase/program cluster review.
Likely broader Penn Reconstruction versus design-services/amendment distinction, but defer pending a Penn Station reconstruction cluster review.

commands_or_sources_used: jq inspection of data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch193-prep.json, codex-identity-batch194-prep.json, and codex-identity-batch195-prep.json
node read-only guard check against data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

deterministic_inspection.source_project_duplicate_scan: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch194-prep.json recorded 18 duplicate project rows / 13 unique project duplicate pairs after identity193; batch195 made no project proposals.

apply_note: If applied later, append these as project pairs to data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json only after re-running the same live guards against then-current merges and do-not-merge state. This artifact intentionally does not edit durable overrides or generated outputs.
